arts.ttl: Tottenham ready to offer £27m for January target, player open to the move
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are hoping to sign the Inter Milan midfielder Davide Frattesi before the January transfer window closes. According to a report from Inter Live, the midfielder is valued at around €45-50 million. Meanwhile, TV Play claims Tottenham are ready to pay €32 million (£27m) in order to sign the player this month. It will […] The post Tottenham ready to offer £27m for January target, player open to the move appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: What Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou did to Tamworth supporters as FA Cup kick-off delayed
arts.sum: The home fans have been making their voices heard before kick-off, with some chants aimed towards Spurs and their manager, Postecoglou. “I've got no doubt the attitude of the players and I think all along the boys have a great understanding of every game's importance and we certainly will go into Sunday's game with the same sort of mindset of making sure that we do things we can control, play our football, put a real big emphasis on the things that we do really well,” he said.

arts.ttl: Arsenal explain Riccardo Calafiori absence from Man United clash as Tottenham fear emerges
arts.sum: Arsenal are without Riccardo Calafiori for Sunday's FA Cup clash with Manchester United due to a muscle injury, the Gunners confirm.

arts.ttl: Tamworth vs Tottenham delayed as Zara employee fixes net with tape on player's shoulders
arts.sum: Tamworth's FA Cup game with Tottenham was temporarily delayed as kick-off was halted due to a problem with the goal net, which was fixed by one of the home players and some tape

arts.ttl: Ange sees Tamworth vs Tottenham FA Cup clash off to bizarre start as he's hit with 'sacked in the morning' chants
arts.sum: The Spurs boss will be looking to avoid an all-time great FA Cup giant-killing against non-league Tamworth

arts.ttl: Report confirms Tottenham offer for South American previously on Man United radar
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have failed with an offer to sign the Colombian international midfielder Richard Rios. The 24-year-old midfielder is highly rated across South America and Europe. He could prove to be a quality acquisition for the North London club. However, a report from Fichajes claims that Tottenham have had their proposal rejected for the player […] The post Report confirms Tottenham offer for South American previously on Man United radar appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Tamworth vs Tottenham kick off delayed for bizarre reason prior to FA Cup tie between sides separated by 96 places
arts.sum: Kick-off for the FA Cup third round tie between Tottenham and Tamworth was delayed as players attempted to fix a problem with the goal netting.

arts.ttl: Tamworth goalkeeper reveals partner gave birth to son night before Tottenham FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Tamworth goalkeeper Jas Singh revealed his partner gave birth to their son the night before his club’s FA Cup clash against Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: LIVE: English National League side Tamworth host Premier League Tottenham
arts.sum: Tamworth host Premier League giants Tottenham. With almost 100 places separating the two clubs in the English football pyramid, the charm of the FA Cup continues. ESPN has updates.

arts.ttl: Alfie Dorrington and two Tottenham players who could leave after Ange Postecoglou claim
arts.sum: When asked in his pre-match press conference if this weekend's FA Cup tie is an opportunity to see some of the younger players such as Dorrington, Mikey Moore and Will Lankshear, Postecoglou's answer perhaps wasn't the response some wanted when it comes to the centre-back receiving a start . Postecoglou is so short on centre-back options right now and it seems the ideal time to share the minutes between Archie Gray and Radu Dragusin as the Australian will not want to push the duo too much and see the numbers in the treatment room increase in the process.
